'''dhavunu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:vacouf|vacouf]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vacouf|vacouf]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhavunu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhævinith|dhævinith]] || [[word:dhævinij|dhævinij]] || [[word:dhævinish|dhævinish]] || [[word:dhævini|dhævini]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhavuvunuth|dhavuvunuth]] || [[word:dhavuvunuj|dhavuvunuj]] || [[word:dhavuvunush|dhavuvunush]] || [[word:dhavuvunu|dhavuvunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhavunuth|dhavunuth]] || [[word:dhavunuj|dhavunuj]] || [[word:dhavunush|dhavunush]] || [[word:dhavunu|dhavunu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhavufnuth|dhavufnuth]] || [[word:dhavufnuj|dhavufnuj]] || [[word:dhavufnush|dhavufnush]] || [[word:dhavufnuf|dhavufnuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhavunuthu|dhavunuthu]] || [[word:dhavunuju|dhavunuju]] || [[word:dhavunushu|dhavunushu]] || [[word:dhavunuku|dhavunuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhavunuth|dhavunuth]] || [[word:dhavunuj|dhavunuj]] || [[word:dhavunush|dhavunush]] || [[word:dhavunu|dhavunu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhavunuthul|dhavunuthul]] || [[word:dhavunujul|dhavunujul]] || [[word:dhavunushul|dhavunushul]] || [[word:dhavunukul|dhavunukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhavunuthuthu|dhavunuthuthu]] || [[word:dhavunujuju|dhavunujuju]] || [[word:dhavunushushu|dhavunushushu]] || [[word:dhavunuku|dhavunuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhavunuthun|dhavunuthun]] || [[word:dhavunujun|dhavunujun]] || [[word:dhavunushun|dhavunushun]] || [[word:dhavunukun|dhavunukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhavunuthuoro|dhavunuthuoro]] || [[word:dhavunujuoro|dhavunujuoro]] || [[word:dhavunushuoro|dhavunushuoro]] || [[word:dhavunukuoro|dhavunukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a27364f}}
